summary: Plan-mode inventory classification only. The job is not a dedupe cluster, has no canonical item, and disallows merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal PR closeout. All five listed PRs are open, non-security, contributor PRs with distinct scopes, so the conservative plan is to keep each independent rather than close or merge.

actions.reason: Distinct, active PR with nontrivial code and proof gap; no hydrated canonical or close basis.
Meaningful but unresolved contributor PR; not duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or safe to close.
Focused PR with a unique network/proxy scope but failed proof/checks; keep open for normal review.
Small, plausibly useful PR with proof supplied, but failing checks and unhydrated linked issue prevent close/merge-style treatment.
Distinct active bug-fix PR with linked issue context but failed proof and checks; keep independent for normal contributor/maintainer follow-up.
